[PDF_PAGE 6 | score=3] Notations for flying creatures include a Maneuverability Class from A to E. Class A creatures have virtually total command over their movements in the air; they can hover, face any direc- tion in a given round, and attack each round. Class B creatures are very maneuverable; they can hover, turn 180 degrees in a round, and attack in each round. Class C creatures are some- what agile in the air; they cannot move less than half their movement rate without falling, they can turn up tn 90 degrees in a round, and attack aerially once every two rounds.
